title: Learning Graph Color Test
subject: Mathematics
author: Dan McCreary
learningObjectives: Evaluate whether 17 pastel web-safe colors give sufficient visual distinction between taxonomy groups in a 50-node learning graph
Identify named CSS colors such as MistyRose, PaleTurquoise, and Thistle in the legend and match them to their node groups
Explain the round-robin assignment that places nodes 1, 18, and 35 in the same color group across 17 groups
Explain why black label text is used on light pastel nodes while white text is needed on darker colors like Plum and LightCoral
Distinguish overlapping color groups by dragging nodes within the force-directed physics layout
